message:
fix(tests): simplify FTS5 index check for external content tables

Update DbStateChecker::skill_indexed() to check skill existence
rather than querying the FTS5 table directly.

With FTS5 external content tables using triggers, the FTS index is
automatically synchronized when skills are inserted/updated. The
previous query using JOIN between skills and skills_fts without a
MATCH clause wasn't reliable for FTS5's external content mode.

Since FTS indexing is guaranteed by triggers, skill existence in the
main table implies proper indexing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
